item.title: Beyond coverage
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
It looks like theôÙre are a lot of opiôÙnions or asôÙsumpôÙtions about unit tesôÙts anôÙd ôÙcoôÙde coôÙveôÙraôÙge, most of them conôÙfuôÙsing of biaôÙsed in seôÙveôÙral waôÙys. For examôÙple, I'ôÙve heard or read things like "this is fiôÙne, it has X% coôÙveôÙraôÙge", or "cheôÙckinôÙg ôÙfor coôÙveôÙraôÙge on puôÙll reôÙquesôÙts doesôÙn't helôÙp", or "droôÙpping the coôÙveôÙraôÙge leôÙvel is ôÙnot an isôÙsue", and many moôÙre of the like.

This artiôÙcle aiôÙms to shed soôÙme liôÙght on the isôÙsue of unit tesôÙting wiôÙth and coôÙde ôÙcoôÙveôÙraôÙge. HoôÙpeôÙfuôÙlly by the end of it, we'ôÙll get an idea of whiôÙch of the ôÙpreôÙvious staôÙteôÙmenôÙts are riôÙght and whiôÙch are wrong (sôÙpoiôÙler alerôÙt: theôÙy'ôÙre all wôÙronôÙg, but for diôÙffeôÙrent reaôÙsonôÙs).

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 5 minutos de lectura)

item.title: A few ideas on code review
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
After waôÙtching a taôÙlk about coôÙde reôÙview [1], from the last EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthoôÙn, I goôÙt ôÙsoôÙme ideas that I'd like to suôÙmôÙmaôÙriôÙse.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 2 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Upcoming talk at EuroPython 2016
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
I am glad to inôÙform that I wiôÙll be speaking at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016 conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce.

I'ôÙll speak @euôÙroôÙpôÙyôÙthon 2016:
'Clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn' httpôÙs://ôÙt.ôÙcoôÙ/e4ôÙclWU3aDM

ã MaôÙriano (@rôÙmaôÙriaôÙnoa) March 27, 2016

My suôÙbmisôÙsion about clean coôÙde in PyôÙthon was acôÙcepôÙteôÙd, so in the next ediôÙtion of EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016, in BilôÙbao, SpaiôÙn, I wiôÙll taôÙlk about clean coôÙde prinôÙciôÙples for PyôÙthoôÙn. HeôÙre is the absôÙtracôÙt:

https://ep2016.europython.eu/conference/talks/clean-code-in-python

The fuôÙll list of taôÙlks is avaiôÙlaôÙble at:

https://ep2016.europython.eu/en/events/sessions/

If you are inôÙteôÙresôÙteôÙd, subsôÙcriôÙbe to the EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon blog and YouôÙtuôÙbe chanôÙneôÙl. I wiôÙll inôÙcluôÙde moôÙre deôÙtailôÙs in a seôÙpaôÙraôÙte posôÙt.

item.title: Deleting commented out code
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
This is a ruôÙle I alwaôÙys enôÙcouôÙraôÙge in soôÙftwaôÙre deôÙveôÙloôÙpôÙmenôÙt. MoôÙreoôÙveôÙr, I conôÙsiôÙder it to be soôÙmeôÙthing that haôÙs ôÙto be inôÙcluôÙded in eveôÙry coôÙding guiôÙdeôÙliôÙne of a good proôÙjecôÙt.

TheôÙre are seôÙveôÙral reaôÙsons for this, but proôÙbaôÙbly the best exôÙplaôÙnaôÙtion can be found in the book "Clean CoôÙde"[1] by unôÙcle ôÙBoôÙb, on whiôÙch exôÙplains that the coôÙde, geôÙts ouôÙtdated (roôÙtten) wiôÙth the rest of the suôÙrrounôÙding coôÙde, and henôÙce it makes a plaôÙce for conôÙfuôÙsioôÙn, leaôÙding to an erroôÙr-ôÙproôÙne spoôÙt.

TheôÙre are, hoôÙweôÙveôÙr, peoôÙple that seem to find soôÙme arôÙguôÙmenôÙts for coôÙmôÙmenôÙting out coôÙde, or leaôÙving it. ôÙSoôÙme coôÙmôÙmon arôÙguôÙmenôÙts/ôÙreaôÙsons usuaôÙlly are:

  • "I miôÙght need this funcôÙtioôÙnaôÙliôÙty laôÙteôÙr.."

We haôÙve sourôÙce conôÙtrol sysôÙteôÙms (for examôÙple giôÙt) for this. In giôÙt, anôÙyôÙthing can be resôÙtoôÙred from a preôÙvious poôÙinôÙt. If ôÙthe soôÙftwaôÙre is proôÙperôÙly unôÙder verôÙsion conôÙtroôÙl, theôÙre is no reaôÙson to fear daôÙta loôÙss. Trust giôÙt, coôÙde fearôÙleôÙssôÙlôÙy.

  • "This is temôÙpoôÙraôÙry diôÙsaôÙbleôÙd... It wiôÙll be resôÙtoôÙred laôÙteôÙr".

AgaiôÙn, saôÙme prinôÙciôÙple, reôÙly on the verôÙsion conôÙtrol sysôÙteôÙm. Save a paôÙtch, and then resôÙtoôÙre laôÙteôÙr, or stash the chanôÙges, reôÙvert the coôÙmôÙmiôÙt, etc. As you see, theôÙre are plenôÙty of beôÙtter opôÙtions for solôÙving this sceôÙnaôÙrio.

  • CoôÙde that was leôÙft from the fist verôÙsion

ProôÙbaôÙbly deôÙbuôÙgging leôÙftoôÙverôÙs. No doubt heôÙre: seek, loôÙcaôÙte, desôÙtroôÙy.

TheôÙre is, a clear proôÙblem wiôÙth coôÙde that is unôÙder coôÙmôÙmenôÙt, whiôÙch is that it is "froôÙzen" in tiôÙme: it was good at soôÙme poôÙinôÙt, but then it was leôÙft theôÙre whiôÙle the rest of the coôÙde around it, evolôÙveôÙd, so this old coôÙde ôÙmiôÙght not cerôÙtainôÙly woôÙrk (henôÙce it is "roôÙtten"), so un-ôÙcoôÙmôÙmenôÙting it is a bad idea beôÙcauôÙse it wiôÙll proôÙbaôÙbly crasôÙh.

AnoôÙther proôÙblem is that it can be a sourôÙce of bias for soôÙme other deôÙveôÙloôÙpeôÙr, who wanôÙts to mainôÙtain that coôÙde at a fuôÙtuôÙre poôÙinôÙt in tiôÙme. The one who leôÙft the roôÙtten coôÙde, miôÙght haôÙve thouôÙght that it was a sourôÙce of insôÙpiôÙraôÙtion for when this funcôÙtioôÙnaôÙliôÙty waôÙs ôÙgoôÙing to be applieôÙd, but insôÙteaôÙd, it is just biaôÙsing the new deôÙveôÙloôÙper wiôÙth this skeôÙleôÙtoôÙn, preôÙvenôÙting from a brand new, fresôÙh iôÙdea for that coôÙde.

TheôÙreôÙfoôÙre, for theôÙse main reaôÙsons (an proôÙbaôÙbly muôÙch moôÙre), haôÙving coôÙde that is coôÙmôÙmenôÙted in a coôÙde baôÙse, is a poor pracôÙtiôÙce, (not toôÙ ôÙmenôÙtion a coôÙde smeôÙll). If you are a seaôÙsoôÙned deôÙveôÙloôÙpeôÙr, who caôÙres about coôÙde quaôÙliôÙty, and best pracôÙtiôÙceôÙs, you must not doubt when ôÙdeôÙleôÙting it. DeôÙleôÙte coôÙmôÙmenôÙted out coôÙde merôÙciôÙleôÙssôÙlôÙy: seek, loôÙcaôÙte and desôÙtroôÙy.

[1]A book I highly recommend: https://www.amazon.com/Clean-Code-Handbook-Software-Craftsmanship/dp/0132350882
